summary: Executed backend + frontend testing for new Drawing Analyzer module and key regressions on public preview URL, including PNG upload and PDF API analysis paths.

integration_issues.issue: Backend returns market_rates_used in drawing analysis response, but Drawing Analyzer UI has no visible section/table to show those rates to users.

action_items: Add a visible market rates section in Drawing Analyzer results to expose market_rates_used data from backend.
Retest Drawing Analyzer UI after adding market-rates visibility to confirm user-facing integration completeness.
critical_code_review_comments: Drawing analyzer endpoint and UI flow are stable in tested scenarios (PNG/PDF).
No API 500s observed in tested drawing analyzer and regression endpoints.
No MOCKED APIs used during this run.
seed_data_creation: Created test files only (/app/tests/assets/*). No persistent DB seed records created directly in this cycle.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://buildcalc-estimate.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest suite now includes drawing analyzer coverage in /app/backend/tests/test_drawing_analyzer.py; full suite result: 16/16 pass. Frontend Playwright validated nav route, unsupported-format rejection, PNG analyze flow, manual-vs-AI table, report download action, and route regressions for Estimate/BOQ/Local Market Rates/Suppliers/Reports.
rca of the issue: Feature gap RCA: drawing analysis backend response includes market_rates_used, but frontend DrawingAnalyzerPage does not render that field. Root cause is missing presentation layer mapping rather than API failure.
